name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard Mutual NDA for sharing confidential information between two parties, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Covers confidentiality obligations, permitted disclosures, and term of agreement.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Mutual NDA, used to capture the specific deal terms (parties, effective date, governing law) that are incorporated by reference into the Standard Terms.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering subscription terms, acceptable use, data handling, warranties, and liability. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for early-stage product development partnerships, where a customer agrees to provide feedback and participate in product development in exchange for early or discounted access.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard SLA defining uptime commitments, measurement methodology, and remedies such as service credits. Designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for engaging a vendor to deliver professional or consulting services, covering statements of work, deliverables, payment terms, intellectual property ownership, and liability.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard DPA for governing the processing of personal data on behalf of a controller, designed to satisfy GDPR and other data protection law requirements including sub-processor obligations and data subject rights.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing software to customers, covering license grant, restrictions, maintenance and support, fees, warranties, and liability. Suitable for on-premise or hosted software.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement for formalizing business partnerships, covering roles and responsibilities, revenue sharing, intellectual property, exclusivity, and termination rights.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard short-term trial or evaluation agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a full commercial deal. Covers pilot scope, fees, IP, and transition to a full agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard BAA for HIPAA compliance, governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) by a business associate on behalf of a covered entity. Covers permitted uses, safeguards, breach notification, and termination.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum adding AI-specific terms to an existing agreement, covering AI system usage restrictions, data handling for AI training, output ownership, accuracy disclaimers, and compliance obligations.
